parameters.subject: =Your {{ $('Save Lead to CRM').item.json.Service }} Solution - Let's Discuss Your Needs
parameters.message:
=

Hi{{ $('Save Lead to CRM').item.json.Name }} h2>

Thank you for your interest in {{ $('Save Lead to CRM').item.json.Service }}. I wanted to follow up on your inquiry and explore how we can best serve your needs.

What we understand from your inquiry:

  • Service Need:{{ $('Save Lead to CRM').item.json.Service }}

Based on your requirements, we have a few options that might work well for you:

  1. Free Consultation Call - 30 minutes to understand your specific needs (no obligation)
  2. Custom Proposal - Tailored solution matching your budget and timeline
  3. Live Demo - See our platform in action and how it solves your challenges

Would you be available for a quick call this week? I'm flexible with timing and happy to work around your schedule.

Available slots:

  • Monday - Friday: 10 AM - 6 PM (Your Time)
  • Weekend: By appointment

Simply reply to this email with your preferred time, or click the link below to book directly:

📅 Book a Demo

Looking forward to connecting!

Best Regards,
Your Sales Team

parameters.subject: =Quick Question: {{$json.service}} Timeline
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{$json.fullName}},

I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to reach out again regarding your interest in {{$json.service}}.

I noticed you received our initial proposal, and I wanted to check in:

Quick Questions:

  • Do you have any questions about the {{$json.service}} solution?
  • What's your ideal timeline for implementation?
  • Would a demo or consultation call be helpful?
  • Do you need any additional information to make a decision?

I'm here to help answer any questions and ensure {{$json.service}} is the right fit for {{$json.company}}.

Feel free to:

  • Reply directly to this email
  • Call me at [Your Phone Number]
  • Schedule a time that works best for you

Looking forward to connecting soon!

Best Regards,
Your Sales Team

parameters.subject: =🎁 Special Offer Inside - {{$json.service}} 30% Discount (48 Hours Only)
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{$json.fullName}},

Thank you for your continued interest in {{$json.service}}. I wanted to personally reach out with an exclusive offer just for you.

🎁 EXCLUSIVE OFFER

30% Discount on {{$json.service}}

⏰ Valid for 48 Hours Only!

What's Included:

  • ✅ 30% off first 6 months

  • ✅ Dedicated account manager
  • ✅ Priority support
  • ✅ Custom integration assistance
  • ✅ Training for your team

Pricing Details:

Regular Price: {{$json.currency}} {{$json.budget}}

Your Price: {{$json.currency}} {{Math.round($json.budget * 0.7)}}

You Save: {{$json.currency}} {{Math.round($json.budget * 0.3)}}

  1. Reply to this email with your confirmation
  2. Schedule your onboarding call
  3. Get your account activated within 24 hours

⚠️ Important: This offer expires in 48 hours. After that, standard pricing applies. Don't miss this opportunity!

If you have any questions about this offer or need clarification on any features, I'm just a reply away.

Best Regards,
Your Sales Team

parameters.subject: =Final Message - {{$json.fullName}}, We'd Love to Help
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{$json.fullName}},

This is our final follow-up regarding {{$json.service}}. We want to make sure we haven't missed an opportunity to help {{$json.company}} grow.

I understand that you're busy, and the timing might not be perfect right now. However, I wanted to leave you with a few important points:

Why {{$json.service}} is Important Now:

  • 🚀 Competitive Advantage: Your competitors might already be using similar solutions
  • 💰 Cost Savings: Automate processes and reduce operational costs
  • ⚡ Faster Growth: Scale without proportional increase in team size
  • 📊 Better Insights: Data-driven decisions for your business

Your Next Step Options:

  1. Schedule a Quick Chat (15 mins) - No commitment, just explore possibilities
  2. Email Your Questions - I'll respond within 2 hours
  3. Ask for References - Talk to similar companies using our solution
  4. Keep My Info - Reach out when you're ready

If you'd like to explore {{$json.service}} at any point, I'm here for you.

Best Regards,
Your Sales Team

Contact Info:
Email: sales@yourcompany.com
Phone: [Your Phone]
Website: www.yourcompany.com

If you'd like to unsubscribe from future communications, please reply with 'UNSUBSCRIBE'.
